subparts.text: What is the purpose of stop word removal in text preprocessing?
Explain the concept of TF-IDF and its significance in text analysis.
Define morphology and state its role in Natural Language Processing.
What is ambiguity in NLP? Briefly explain with an example.
What is Neural Machine Translation and state two different from phrase-based MT?
What is the purpose of using LSTM in sequential data processing?
Mention two differences between CNN and RNN in the context of NLP.
Write the formula for calculating Inverse Document frequency . Why it is called so?

questions.question_text: Explain the components of Natural Language Processing with suitable examples. How do these components work together in a typical NLP system?
What is parsing in NLP? Describe different parsing techniques and the challenges involved in syntactic analysis.
Compare and contrast word2vec, doc2vec, and GLoVe word embedding techniques. Discuss their working principles and applications in NLP tasks.
Explain the different formats used for representing a text corpus. How do these formats influence text preprocessing and model training?
Describe various approaches to Machine Translation. Compare rule- based, statistical, and neural methods with examples.
Explain the architecture of the Anusaraka system. How does it handle translation using the interlingua approach?
Explain the working of LSTM and GRU models. Highlight how they overcome the limitations of standard RNNs in language modeling.
Discuss the use of the Natural Language Toolkit for implementing deep learning-based NLP tasks with examples.
